name: kite_nearest_hostile
description: Back away from nearest hostile while keeping distance for ranged engagement
parameters: z.object({ preferredDistance: z.number().min(5).max(40).default(28).describe("Ideal distance to maintain from the hostile target"), retreatThreshold: z.number().min(2).max(30).default(20).describe("Distance at which the bot will actively try to back away"), maxDurationMs: z.number().int().min(1000).max(60000).default(10000).describe("Maximum time to perform the kiting behavior"), equipBow: z.boolean().default(true).describe("Whether to equip and shoot a bow while kiting"), targetEntityId: z.union([z.number(), z.string()]).optional().describe("Specific entity ID to kite; if omitted, the nearest hostile is used") })
